textByHash.032d9bc206107b8638eaf935d7bd6eb6cc029c78: No, what we want you to do is bring Doctor Fenkenstrain to us to do the operation.
textByHash.056e1917e729aeb734584b374d3e0bf5afce2cfd: W-wait...I have a bad feeling about this...
textByHash.061419a3eff8533ab14ab00df3ae934b26f8b292: The doctor was delivered safely, although it seems like a bunch of pirates have stolen your cats.
textByHash.0a5161b6df2daf4c8f45809ce0a5daecb9630530: Silly me, all this excitement - and likely that crude brain-operation - made me totally forget. I'm sure that it'll all work out somehow.
textByHash.0b79f202aff4bbc7cf91dae27df2b50fe09bc3c7: While I trust your skills in all other areas, I can state without fear of contradiction when I say that you are not a brain surgeon.
textByHash.0f2e33de8f5c837d32865f2616a5e66b6274816e: You should be prepared for a f-fierce battle.
textByHash.19f1a82345b179f09611f0902a019c3d0d4242c9: Do you want me to take you back to Mos Le'Harmless?
textByHash.27d036d04f82e469e9431b5efbfcec3a4585361a: Well, the abbot was slain by a group of raiders. Apparently his faith was little protection against their repeated sword blows.
textByHash.2967fe47bbe58a926607a35285f60bcb4364c462: Oh dear...in all the excitement I completely forgot about them...
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.2d27127a382df9a274289420d5353865c38ccefa: I need you to answer this for me.
textByHash.31f8c54ecf52e31eefb861423984dfa8c4a3990e: This washed up on the beach earlier. I thought you could get it fixed by Smithing Smith in Mos Le'Harmless. It could be valuable.
textByHash.328a3b8b957c0503403aba9b3c30ba3256b83a1e: Certainly! Saradomin blesses you for your valiant effort!
textByHash.3308eec9d259c8a72a4194a5ebf1f276507a0a8c: Well done! The power of Saradomin will keep the poison from affecting anyone within these walls.
textByHash.33dd343da3abdf8a01b57fbf251573e1752b8e3c: Now, I'll just transport us to the island...
textByHash.3b241f24565bcf67ffec7f3cd4e5c1e03d3bb548: Your concern is most gratifying. Saradomin be with you.
textByHash.3c59fe232ed6c904979c5d92c1ab7dcad9f81e63: This morning, however, we were awakened by the sound of a ship running aground and, as we readied ourselves to venture out to look for survivors, zombie pirates poured into the monastery.
textByHash.3d9efafe66b024d99915a5fe5780c6e66fc68cc7: So have you read the book?
textByHash.41db1b45a6395e89cdd11eaad67c6192c3332721: You have my word that he will not be able to continue his depraved experiments here on this island and will instead be moulded into a useful and faithful follower of Saradomin.
textByHash.424dab1db462d71c5ba17ef70e151f2441282549: Well, the secret passage into the monastery is located in the gardens.
textByHash.44c4b22f78f992255989dfa60a217ca2017339d4: Have you thought any more about helping our order?
textByHash.470a6831a9b1c98cfd72b409509e36cbcd0dadcb: Are you all right, my child?
textByHash.478da1ba3322ee1715282a4dbbdde55466a780f0: Here, I'll take you straight back to Mos Le'Harmless.
textByHash.4d3e02da3f03a5b6294c5540621fede721ed3ae2: D-do you want me to take you back to the island?
textByHash.4d99bc1e58496fcb9035a7865af5447b56c04fb8: Want me to take you back to Mos Le'Harmless?
textByHash.57f8e2c5459d7a22e400631e3a61280d12cabef2: I have no doubt that they know who it is, but I get the feeling that they will not tell you.
textByHash.585a2d5aced18f8c27e070c7e4cdde919ceff22c: We fought our way to the granary and have barred the doors. We stored our now brainless bodies downstairs in case we can be put back to normal.
textByHash.5b145f01924728fd5aaac35db2b86bf6c47367ed: I cannot, but I do recall hearing it before.
textByHash.5c2553ac99f4b4a52921ee030317f15111d10552: It is a pity he escaped, but Saradomin's justice will find him in the end.
textByHash.5e638cb2605ae8b5b7bf6f1fd4f5d5d2d8b66c2e: Oh, well hurry to the Edgeville Monastery and get it. We haven't got a moment to lose!
textByHash.6102bbdc083af9a06b443d9a8babb380443c509f: Would you like me to take you to Harmony?
textByHash.69201420c3591cde013a2cec02004699381bf219: Oh, that? Sounds a little like locusts.
textByHash.70db559ad895b4a732ad40361acf7e56696f2732: That's all part of the problem...and we can't talk here.
textByHash.7533aaf7457d636cbe1a42a9b15b9c1e43ba8e2d: One of the pirates on the island said it while in the grip of a terrible fever. The others quietened him down and refused to answer any questions about it.
textByHash.759c6d787b049394560296b46e81c3be8a3a3a69: The pirates m-must have moved something large into the s-secret room to b-block it, and Mi-Gor mentioned he had a bodyguard.
textByHash.76079436810a92cd19c4d577ef55a1762157d76c: Now that you know our plight, will you help us?
textByHash.79d40bdab1cd4d4fc14ba34715abc443862fc630: A lot better, thanks. Can I help you with anything?
textByHash.7a7a726863cb43586948dfda94a2b021a3258b0a: No, what I'm thinking of is a prayer written centuries ago by one of the abbots at the Edgeville Monastery.
textByHash.7bd5e766a53075468e88e4b393e0560d3c46ec85: Well hurry! Who knows what depredations are going on back on Harmony!
textByHash.7c5812e3228818cf5d69a6938c1cdaede601667d: We are a cloistered order of Saradominist monks. We use this island's relative isolation to translate and illuminate books. We even have a treaty with the pirates; they leave us alone and we provide the occasional
textByHash.858cb4113b5d7b13baa16fa2a947de5a4e7d6b96: What use is it there? Go get it and hurry back. We haven't got a moment to lose!
textByHash.8710a4860993d07063f9eb63ed0a69f5f9ec9c2a: It looked like they were going to storm the doors, but then Mi-Gor called them off.
textByHash.8e5932643535d1fe99cefdd32484c22766d21479: Anyway, I'll just use the teleport spell I created. Let's go!
textByHash.9430fcf613d52a2bf515879a5e90bc8ec793d9c7: The words! The words of power that would prevent...
textByHash.95eb928330a3e75d50b9cd9bb758f72e9ea1f5f6: Hmm, that is odd. Have you considered seeing a doctor?
textByHash.99e4277c6e49f5f6e5808ecf249747a4dfe3aeba: When you took the book from the shelf, did you say the words?
textByHash.9a41a2f0922d34c5669c678c8ebf341454a2156e: I'm looking for a bold and true adventurer to help me with a...a...a little problem?
textByHash.9bf15a0d9665dda13837ca9cd687289dd3835328: Anyway, the book of prayers he wrote was stored in the Edgeville Monastery, so you will need to go there and retrieve it. And quickly!
textByHash.9c4787384a8e77a97587772e0dd557fc36e3e8c8: Basically, I think when you tell him we have a werewolf- free place for him here on the island, I'm sure he'll agree to come.
textByHash.9c6d26389caca53824ed916ae357321e789f01d9: Tell him that he is welcome here in exchange for his help.
textByHash.9ce9c30ec8202e2e0f2ba3a23163f79596d5bf4a: So long as you are unharmed, that is the main thing.
textByHash.9e4804f338adcf43e0075fd98275e50f953eb1cd: We have to prepare our defence against this threat. I recall something that might well help...
textByHash.a882d1ad9930c569311c9d9d08b0904e273d9240: Oh, but of course. I understand that this is very confusing.
textByHash.a9b7504c359a009e52f6467120bb364f513051f0: Our island has been overrun by undead pirates.
textByHash.ab925957f7d637f5690ea7c35ea5fdc5fb90023a: Well, the doctor is downstairs, waiting for you. I think he said he needed some things before he could begin.
textByHash.aeaafc358436f7994ad0b9d36f50fddf654e6959: Yes, one of the brothers observed him and a few of his sorebones slipping into the water shortly after there was a loud bang from inside the building.
textByHash.b08312e07db700b452fa0efc542487ca344d2358: I do hope that we can fix things before the locusts arrive...
textByHash.b811cde7d3829c579f77d420ae0b7fa2f3d88a77: Not that we could tell. They seemed to be being given orders by a twisted little zombie called Mi-Gor and his cadre of sorebones.
textByHash.c212f9fa69e43ae828f5727ada3e91755e47a767: No, no. You see, the gas will work on us faster than a normal poison, and a potion would take too long to diffuse through the stomach.
textByHash.c54412f14a63c35255fb63570bb137ee6b8d8512: Here is a lamp blessed by Saradomin. If you pray over it, it will grant you wisdom.
textByHash.d1c2bf905e98fe883da65a44664c086a787e34a7: Wait a moment, I forgot to tell you them, didn't I?
textByHash.d28fe741a3ab0f0d62c28bfb4c951111ee4cf6ab: It's true. We need your help...will you at least listen to us?
textByHash.d4b12bb58e5de9d4949e143ad973d433223a738d: How can that be? Go check again!
textByHash.d50d30d69f3a3205a0c2be516ea88b68c9065f5c: So, have you found anything out about the pirates' plans?
textByHash.d5ef3772efe6958ab785c92be08861cf7e9ab66e: Quickly, the pirates have released the gas! Use the prayer, the other brothers will help make it powerful enough to cover the whole of the granary.
textByHash.d9cf110ee42f48b2dd1da99714056b86f9c57b7a: Are you alright? We dragged you back inside as quickly as we could.
textByHash.d9cf4e4e475a5353eb1d955f7a02dd680bb7d92f: Have a word with the others. They will bless you before you leave.
textByHash.da6ffe73df021f291b5cb6faaba7a31a48b8b1f7: Well, when you do, try your best to persuade him to help.
textByHash.e3a025327e0e1e0b62f4e93cc6281befbbb391ed: I laid low, pretending to still be unconscious and, after a while, made my move, freeing the others that had been 'enhanced'.
textByHash.e418be50199ebeb08abad012da61e4b4dc85e414: If you pull the statue there out of the way you'll be able to get into the tunnels, and from there into the monastery.
textByHash.e47e779cacc0ce3d333a480fa9ca69d7f4771290: I remember a terrible pain, and then woke up in this body with Mi-Gor nearby, gloating about having 'enhanced' a zombie with a non-rotting brain.
textByHash.e9b6209394b5d7a093eec9b04929bc4a8134a090: Great! Do you have everything you'll need?
textByHash.ec74439b3532255038dc631100434a196c59daaa: Well, fun as that would be, I was wondering if you could help us get our brains back into the right bodies.
textByHash.ef176d21ad8f156f290f0978442397cf3af4ddb7: In addition to wanting him to come here and help us, we also would like to let the poor soul atone for his sins and for his attempts to meddle in domains into which man was never meant to pry.
textByHash.ef55cd003c318da266f4c25c241b2e39963beb44: Oh, don't worry, it'll only be a little swarm.
textByHash.f0afa1470fa1d62e8dd0c1b7a89a1639c97bea54: Some of us, like myself, were dragged away.
textByHash.f62b7e17f7722a4abfa4be9d31110074db9effda: Well, all I can say is that I am from a small, cloistered order of monks from a tiny island nearby, and that we have a problem with undead pirates...
textByHash.f9330637b0d92a73b20c1443380a98a389ea64c1: Sorry to have bothered you; I'm looking for a more experienced adventurer.
textByHash.f98ae991bc7df7e2c708a20f9466b41389b45c50: There is a secret tunnel into the monastery under the statue in the garden. If you get inside, you can find out what they are planning and we can counter it.
